Parent-root staged-scope inspection excluding unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift

Confirm source/package/lockfile status shows only intended source/test changes and no package or lockfile changes.
Run JSON parsing for touched packet JSON files and `git diff --check` on the staged publication scope.

Push the commit to `origin/clean-main` without rewriting remote configuration.
Before host reconciliation, prove the host dirty source/test diff still matches the validated artifact hash or published target blobs.
Reconcile `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit without mutating `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Confirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at the published commit and the old clone remains untouched.
Write the publication handoff and route the next packet as a bounded post-publication workstation-migration readiness reassessment, not migration approval.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no migration approval, dependency install, package-manager activation/download, package mutation, lockfile mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, or old-clone mutation.

Excluded unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift.
Ran `git diff --cached --check`; after trimming blank EOF lines in two new handoffs, it passed.

Reconciled the prepared host mirror by restoring only the two proven dirty source/test files and fast-forwarding `/home/olares/code/apex` to `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c`.
Confirmed `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remains untouched at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count 30.

Did not approve migration, install dependencies, activate/download package managers, mutate packages or lockfiles, mutate runtime or services, rewrite remotes, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, roll back, or mutate the old clone.
closure_note: Packet 057 completed as bounded publication and host reconciliation for the validated Packet 053 source artifact. Publication hygiene is restored at commit `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c`, and `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at that commit.
